last_action: Implemented Pagination for Leases and Tenant History, optimized Bill Mobile UX, and fixed critical settlement bugs.
summary: Phase 14: UX Optimization & Scalability. Implemented pagination for Lease Management and Tenant History tables to ensure smooth performance with large datasets. Optimized the Tenant Bill view for mobile devices, resolving layout overflows and improving touch usability. Refined the Tenant Approval flow with immediate visual feedback (Loading state) and fixed calculation bugs for multi-room approvals. Resolved critical database integrity and attribute errors in the settlement process, ensuring robust move-out handling even for legacy data. Standardized fee mapping from Admin settings to correctly identify deposits and advance rent credits.
next_steps: Conduct a full end-to-end test of the pro-rata billing cycle with actual meter readings.
Implement a CSV/PDF export feature for the Tenant History and Settlement records.
Enhance the Admin Dashboard with more detailed financial analytics and revenue charts.
